items.title: Codex CLI 0.144.0 adds 'writes' approval mode; 0.144.1 patches the installer
items.why: Go straight to 0.144.1 — you get 0.144.0's new writes approval mode (declared reads auto-allowed, writes prompt) and MCP auth prompts on by default, plus the standalone install-script fix.

items.title: OpenAI ships GPT-5.6 GA: Sol, Terra, Luna across API, ChatGPT and Codex
items.why: Sol, Terra and Luna hit the API at $5/$2.50/$1 per 1M input with Programmatic Tool Calling and a multi-agent beta — rerun your own evals before switching defaults: the Fable-beating numbers are OpenAI's own, and Willison's hands-on still reaches for Claude on hard coding.

items.title: Claude Code 2.1.200–.205: questions wait for you, 'default' mode is now Manual
items.why: Since .199: AskUserQuestion now waits instead of auto-continuing (idle timeout is opt-in via /config), 'default' permission mode is renamed Manual, .203 fixes the macOS 15–20s session-open stall, and .205 fixes a Windows worktree removal that could delete files outside the worktree — update.

items.title: MCP TS SDK 2.0.0-beta.3: runtime-neutral auth, OAuth discovery, Zod elicitation
items.why: Bearer auth and OAuth discovery no longer need Express — the same code now runs on Cloudflare Workers, Deno and Bun, elicit() takes a Zod schema directly, and non-JSON POSTs now get 415 if you compose custom transports.

items.title: Agent SDK (TS) 0.3.200–.205: interrupt receipts, background-task level events
items.why: interrupt() now returns a typed receipt of still-queued messages, background_tasks_changed reports live tasks as a level instead of started/notification edge pairs, and .202 adds parent_agent_id for reconstructing agent trees — feature-detect via system/init before relying on the new events.

items.title: Meta opens Muse Spark 1.1 API: agentic claims, no benchmarks, no harness support
items.why: Meta's first Spark API ships with agentic claims but no benchmarks, no pricing and no coding-harness support — the only way to poke it today is Willison's llm-meta-ai plugin; nothing to change in your setup.
